nasb.text: While Peter was still speaking these words, the Holy Spirit fell upon all those who were listening to the message.

esv.text: While Peter was still saying these things, the Holy Spirit fell on all who heard the word.

cnv.text: 彼得還在說話的時候，聖靈降在所有聽道的人身上，

ccb.text: 彼得还在说话的时候，圣灵就降临在每一个听道的人身上。

csbs.text: 彼得还在讲这些话的时候，圣灵降临在每个听这话语的人身上。
